data_coverage_summary: Tive APIs has public documentation that indicates shipment and asset visibility workflows across shipments, tracked assets, events, positions. Public developer docs/portal.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for shipment and asset visibility, especially when webhook-driven event delivery is part of the integration design. Tive should be treated as a rest api surface for shipment and asset visibility workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Tive APIs indicates Public developer docs/portal. The documented surface aligns with shipment and asset visibility workflows and covers shipments, tracked assets, events, positions. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates logistics-visibility workflows for tracked assets, shipment events, positions, and webhook-driven status delivery.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Tive APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as shipment and asset visibility workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
